Apocavities._current:
HOPT ACTIVATION
① When this card is activated: Place C Counters on this card, equal to the number of cards your opponent controls.
② You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls and remove up to 4 C Counters from your field; apply this effect to that monster, based on the number removed.
● 1: It loses 500 ATK.
● 2: Its ATK becomes 0.
● 3: Its effects are negated.
● 4: DESTROY it.

Artmage Impasto -Recapture-._current:
HOPT ACTIVATION
If you control an "Artmage" monster, you can activate this card the turn it was Set.
① When your opponent activates a monster effect: You can BANISH 1 Fusion Monster you control (until the End Phase), and if you do, NEGATE the activation, and if you do that, DESTROY that monster, then if you have 3 or more different Monster Types on your field, you can BOUNCE all Spells/Traps your opponent controls.

Artmage Non-Finito._current:
2 "Artmage" monsters
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by DISCARDING 1 Spell/Trap and Tributing 1 Level 7 or higher "Artmage" monster from your hand or field. You can only Special Summon "Artmage Non-Finito" once per turn this way, no matter which method you use.
① If this card is Special Summoned: You can Set 1 "Artmage" Spell/Trap from your Deck.
② QUICK | Once per opponent's turn: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control.

Dragunity Divine Wind._current: During your Main Phase: You can apply 1 of these effects, or if "Dragon Ravine" is in your GY, you can apply any of them, in sequence; ● Add 1 Dragon or Winged Beast monster from your GY to your hand. ● Special Summon 1 "Dragunity" monster from your hand, then you can equip 1 Dragon "Dragunity" monster from your Deck to it as an Equip Spell. You can only use this effect of "Dragunity Divine Wind" once per turn.

Dragunity Falchion._current: You can BANISH this card from your hand or GY, then target 1 "Dragunity" monster you control; equip 1 Dragon "Dragunity" monster from your Deck or GY to it as an Equip Spell. While this card is equipped to a "Dragunity" monster: You can send this card to the GY, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; BANISH it. You can only use each effect of "Dragunity Falchion" once per turn.

Dragunity Knight - Areus._current: 1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Synchro Monsters You can target face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of face-up Monster Cards in your Spell & Trap Zone; NEGATE their effects until the end of this turn. This is a QUICK EFFECT if this card is equipped with an Equip Card. While this card is equipped to a monster: You can Special Summon this card, then you can Special Summon 1 "Dragunity" Tuner from your GY. You can only use each effect of "Dragunity Knight - Areus" once per turn.

Dragunity Quirinus._current: While this card is equipped with an Equip Card, your "Dragunity" monsters cannot be destroyed by battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dragunity Quirinus" once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can SEARCH 1 "Dragunity" Spell/Trap. You can target 1 other "Dragunity" Monster Card you control; BOUNCE it, then you can Special Summon 1 "Dragunity" monster from your hand.

Elfnotes: A Plea for Help._current:
① Your opponent cannot target the monster in your center Main Monster Zone with card effects.
② This card gains the appropriate effects, based on the Attribute(s) of the monster in your center Main Monster Zone.
● FIRE or EARTH: Your Synchro Monster is PIERCING.
● WATER or WIND: Other face-up Spells/Traps you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
● LIGHT or DARK: You take no battle damage.

Elfnotes: Aristeia of Trust._current: ① OPT | You can target 1 face-up monster you control; move that monster you control to another of your Main Monster Zones. ② HOPT | When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card, while you control 3 or more "Elfnote" monsters: You can NEGATE that effect, then if you control a Synchro Monster, you can DESTROY that card. You cannot activate these effects of "Elfnotes: Aristeia of Trust" in the same Chain.

Elfnotes: Rhapsodia of Madness._current: ① While you control a monster in your center Main Monster Zone, your opponent's monsters cannot attack, except to attack that monster. ② HOPT | You can send 1 monster from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 "Elfnote" monster in your GY with a different original Attribute; Special Summon it, then if you control a Synchro Monster, you can NEGATE the effects of 1 face-up card your opponent controls until the end of this turn.

Elfnotes: Welcome Home._current: ① The monster in your center Main Monster Zone cannot be destroyed by card effects. ② HOPT | You can send 1 monster from your hand or field to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Elfnote" monster with a different original Attribute from your Deck in Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters.

Fusion Draft._current: HOPT ACTIVATION DISCARD 1 card, then reveal 1 Fusion Monster in your Extra Deck; SEARCH 1 of the Fusion Materials whose names are mentioned on that revealed monster (from DECK or GY) except the discarded card, then you can add a second such card to your hand, if the first card added was a Normal Monster. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Fusion Monsters.
